task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Annual Report 2023' document in the Nuxeo Projects workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface should be visible, showing the document view for 'Annual Report 2023' located in the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Is Based On' relation from 'Annual Report 2023' to 'Project Proposal'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Nuxeo UI (likely under a 'Relations' tab for 'Annual Report 2023'), there should be an outgoing relation with the predicate 'Is Based On' (or similar Dublin Core term) pointing to the target document 'Project Proposal'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'References' relation from 'Annual Report 2023' to 'Q3 Status Report'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Nuxeo UI for 'Annual Report 2023', there should be an outgoing relation with the predicate 'References' pointing to the target document 'Q3 Status Report'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Conforms To' relation from 'Contract Template' to 'Annual Report 2023'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Nuxeo UI, the document view for 'Contract Template' (in Templates) should show an outgoing relation with the predicate 'Conforms To' pointing to the target document 'Annual Report 2023'.

task_completion.description: Create the summary text file at /home/ga/nuxeo_relations_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, gedit, or VS Code) or terminal window should be visible, creating or editing a file explicitly named '/home/ga/nuxeo_relations_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Write the three relations into the summary file in the format 'Source Predicate Target'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file should contain exactly three lines, each listing a relation in the specified format (e.g., 'Annual Report 2023 Is Based On Project Proposal', 'Annual Report 2023 References Q3 Status Report', 'Contract Template Conforms To Annual Report 2023').

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to establish the relations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Nuxeo web UI (clicking tabs, selecting predicates from dropdowns, searching for target documents) rather than using terminal curl/API commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the relations in Nuxeo before writing the summary file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be visual confirmation in the Nuxeo UI that the relations were successfully added (e.g., appearing in the relations list) rather than the agent just typing the expected text into the report file without doing the Nuxeo work.

integrity.description: The agent manually typed or constructed the summary file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The summary file should be seen being edited in a standard text editor or via standard echo/cat commands, not generated by an automated script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected report path is exactly '/home/ga/nuxeo_relations_report.txt'. The required relations to be established in Nuxeo are: 1. Source: 'Annual Report 2023', Predicate: 'IsBasedOn', Target: 'Project Proposal'. 2. Source: 'Annual Report 2023', Predicate: 'References', Target: 'Q3 Status Report'. 3. Source: 'Contract Template', Predicate: 'ConformsTo', Target: 'Annual Report 2023'.
